touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn outreach to Amelia Osei at OakSphere regarding sales-to-CS handoff challenges. No response received.
Cold email to Amelia highlighting common pain points in eCommerce sales handoffs. Amelia responded expressing interest in learning more about automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: Does your platform integrate with our existing CRM setup?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with major CRMs and can custom-map fields for handoff workflows.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email confirming qualification call time and sharing relevant case study from similar eCommerce company. Amelia confirmed attendance and asked about pricing tiers.

questions_asked.question: What are your pricing tiers for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Shared overview of plans; suggested discussing specifics on the call based on their use case.

touches.ai_summary: 13-minute qualification call with Amelia. Discussed current handoff process using manual spreadsheets and Slack threads. Amelia mentioned evaluating Chorus as well. Confirmed pain points around lost context during rep-to-CS transitions.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for sales-to-CS handoffs?
questions_asked.answer: Manual notes in spreadsheets, sometimes Slack messages. Context gets lost frequently.

questions_asked.question: How does your solution compare to Chorus?
questions_asked.answer: Chorus focuses on conversation intelligence; we specialize in workflow automation and structured handoffs between teams.

next_steps: Include Kevin Katz from implementation team

touches.ai_summary: 32-minute discovery call with Amelia. Walked through unlimited automation tier features and customization options. Amelia confirmed budget range and timeline for Q2 implementation. Discussed 3-seat setup for VP of CS, implementation lead, and one CSM. No executive sponsor identified yet.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in the evaluation decision?
questions_asked.answer: Kevin Katz will handle implementation. I can make the call for CS tools within budget.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally next 3-4 weeks to roll out in Q2.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the automation triggers for our specific handoff criteria?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, fully customizable triggers based on deal stage, customer segment, or custom fields.

objections.objection: Chorus has stronger brand recognition in our space.

next_steps: Send proposal with unlimited automation tier
Schedule technical demo with Kevin Katz

touches.ai_summary: Proposal email sent with $3,200 list price for 3 seats on unlimited automation plan. Included ROI calculator and implementation timeline. Amelia acknowledged receipt and said she's reviewing with Kevin.
Follow-up email checking in on proposal review. Amelia responded that pricing is higher than expected and asked if there's flexibility. Mentioned Chorus pricing is more competitive.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on the pricing? We're seeing lower quotes elsewhere.
questions_asked.answer: Let me connect with my manager about options for your use case and timeline.

touches.ai_summary: Scheduled exec meeting was rescheduled by Amelia due to conflicting priority. Brief 3-minute call to confirm new time. Amelia mentioned budget pressure but still interested.
next_steps: Reschedule exec meeting for next week
touches.reschedule_reason: prospect asked to push by a week

touches.ai_summary: 20-minute negotiation call with Amelia. Presented revised offer at $2,400 ACV (25% discount) to match budget constraints and competitive pressure from Chorus. Amelia expressed appreciation for flexibility and committed to moving forward. Kevin Katz will lead implementation starting next month.

questions_asked.question: At $2,400 for the year, does this work within your approved budget?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, that brings it in line. I can approve this level.

questions_asked.question: What's the implementation timeline once we sign?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 2-3 weeks for setup, then ongoing training and customization with Kevin's team.

objections.objection: Original pricing was above our budget ceiling for this category.

next_steps: Schedule kickoff with Kevin Katz post-signature
